description: Before starting a new design, an engineer must check if any of the relevant industry design codes (e.g., ASME, API) have been updated.

nodes.task_description: Identify the applicable design codes for the project.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer identifies that ASME B31.3 and API 650 are relevant.

nodes.task_description: Query an external standards database to find the latest version of each applicable code.

expected_outcome.value: Agent queries the database and finds a new version of ASME B31.3 was released last month.

nodes.task_description: Notify the lead engineer that the project's design basis needs to be updated to reference the new code version.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a notification to the lead engineer about the required update.
